page: OVHcloud l40s-360 is a GPU-accelerated server belonging to the Cloud GPU family. It features 60 dedicated physical cores powered by the AMD EPYC 9124 processor operating at 2.75 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 360 GB of system memory, providing 6 GB per core. Acceleration is driven by four NVIDIA L40S GPUs based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering a combined 192 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and the network interface supports a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps.

Benchmark results show top-tier performance in large language model (LLM) inference. Prompt processing and text generation speeds for 135M, 7B, and 70B models consistently rank in the top 10% of tested systems. Multi-core CPU performance is strong, with stress-ng multi-core and PassMark CPU scores placing in the top 25%. The system also demonstrates strong capabilities in cryptography and compression, supported by hardware-level AVX-512 and AES instruction sets. However, uncached memory read and write speeds, along with single-core processing metrics, align with average mid-range performance.

Given the high-density GPU configuration and dedicated AMD EPYC processors, this server offers high resource density for specialized workloads. It is highly suitable for generative AI, LLM inference, ray tracing, and parallelized scientific computing. The inclusion of local NVMe storage and high-speed networking makes it an efficient platform for distributed machine learning workloads and complex data processing pipelines where GPU-to-CPU data transfer and raw compute throughput are critical.
description: The OVHcloud l40s-360 is a high-performance GPU-accelerated server designed for intensive computational workloads. It is configured with 60 dedicated AMD EPYC 9124 cores running at 2.75 GHz, 360 GB of system memory, and a 400 GB local NVMe SSD. The server's primary processing power comes from four NVIDIA L40S Ada Lovelace GPUs, providing a total of 192 GB of VRAM. In benchmark testing, the server excels in LLM inference, placing in the top 10% for prompt processing and text generation across various model sizes. It also demonstrates strong multi-core CPU performance and cryptographic execution. This hardware profile makes the l40s-360 highly efficient for machine learning, large language model deployment, ray tracing, and parallel scientific computing.
og_description: OVHcloud l40s-360 is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 60 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 360 GB RAM, a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and four NVIDIA L40S GPUs with 192 GB total VRAM, optimized for top-tier LLM inference.
meta_description: OVHcloud l40s-360 is a GPU-accelerated server with 60 AMD EPYC cores, 360 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA L40S GPUs, delivering top-tier LLM inference performance.
tagline: A high-density GPU server featuring four NVIDIA L40S accelerators and dedicated AMD EPYC processors for demanding machine learning and inference workloads.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA L40S GPUs providing 192 GB of total VRAM.
60 dedicated AMD EPYC 9124 cores running at 2.75 GHz.
Top-tier performance in LLM prompt processing and text generation.
360 GB system memory and 400 GB local NVMe SSD storage.
25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer.
Best suited for generative AI, ray tracing, and parallel scientific computing.
